description: Cloud-based e-commerce platform that enables merchants to create, manage, and optimize online storefronts across multiple channels.
authentication: OAuth 2.0 (client credentials, JWT) and SAML for SSO; APIs require OAuth tokens.
self_serve: Yes – merchants can use the Commerce Cloud Self‑Serve portal to manage store settings, product catalogs, and marketing campaigns.
api_surface: REST APIs (Commerce Cloud REST API), SOAP APIs, OData, and custom APIs via Commerce Cloud SDK.
buildability: High – developers can build custom storefronts using Commerce Cloud SDK, APIs, and Lightning Web Components; also support for headless commerce.
main_blocker: Complex licensing model, high cost, and steep learning curve for developers; integration with legacy systems can be challenging.
